evidence: TASK-065 (gate-aware task readiness, NOW slice of FGAP-061) verified end-to-end. Gates: `npm run build` clean; `npm run check` exit 0; `npm test` exit 0, 0 failures across all packages. Runtime demo — real global `pi-context context-current-state` against freshly-built dist on a /tmp ceremony-built substrate: with the gate target open (FGAP-001 `identified`) TASK-001 reported in `blocked` with `blockedBy:["FGAP-001"]` and absent from `nextActions`; with the gate target closed (FGAP-001 → `closed`) TASK-001 moved to `nextActions` and `blocked` emptied — both directions, real CLI, not mocked. Fresh-context adversarial probe (own fixtures, real CLI): all criteria hold; scope-leak hunt across decision_gated_by_item + prefix/suffix/substring trap relation_types inert (strict literal match); cross-task gates, self/mutual-gate cycles (no crash, no loop), structured-vs-string endpoints, in-progress/accepted non-terminal targets, and requirement→implemented release all confirmed. One probe finding — criterion-3 'byte-identical' falsified only for hand-duplicated task_depends_on_task edges, an input not producible via the dedup-on-write API (appendRelations skips an existing (parent,child,relation_type) triple) — resolved by appending acceptance criterion 11 (the blockersOf dedup contract); no code change warranted. docs-surface-sync: currentState JSDoc + context-current-state op description/promptSnippet + regenerated SKILL.md + CHANGELOG [Unreleased]. Merged to context-jit-spec-v2 at 3872012, rebuilt.
